title: epipactis × hanseniorum
intro: Epipactis × hanseniorum, also known as the Hansen's Helleborine, is a rare, hybrid orchid plant that is the result of a natural cross between Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis microphylla species. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms, making it a potential natural antibiotic. The health benefits of Epipactis × hanseniorum include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Epipactis × hanseniorum can be found in some traditional medicine systems, where it is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for its medicinal properties.
